tasks.subject: Task 1: Fix FastAPI src/requirements.txt path in 5 files
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove all references to `src/requirements.txt` from skill instructions and the fastapi-scaffold Dockerfile.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md:12`
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-database/SKILL.md:31,195,276,366,427`
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-add-integration/SKILL.md:28`
- Modify: `skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md:300`
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md:188,206,285`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `grep -r "src/requirements.txt" skills/` → zero results
- [ ] `grep "COPY src/requirements" skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` → zero results
- [ ] Verification loop no longer lists `src/requirements.txt`

**Verify:** `grep -r "src/requirements.txt" skills/` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-add-auth/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-database/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-add-integration/SKILL.md", "skills/shared-add-logging/SKILL.md", "skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r \"src/requirements.txt\" skills/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grep -r src/requirements.txt skills/ returns zero results", "grep COPY src/requirements skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md returns zero results"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Add 5 missing workflow skills to AGENTS.md routing table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make all 12 shared skills discoverable from AGENTS.md.

**Files:**
- Modify: `AGENTS.md` (Shared Skills table, after line 97)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `grep -c "| \`shared-" AGENTS.md` → 12
- [ ] All 5 new rows use exact `shared-` prefixed names
- [ ] Each new row has a when-to-use clause

**Verify:** `grep -c "| \`shared-" AGENTS.md` → `12`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AGENTS.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c \"| \\`shared-\" AGENTS.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AGENTS.md Shared Skills table has 12 rows", "All 5 new rows use exact shared- prefixed names", "Each row has a when-to-use clause"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Fix nextjs-scaffold frontmatter description
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove "NextAuth" from the skill description so agents don't assume auth is bundled.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md` (frontmatter line ~3)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] description line contains no "NextAuth"
- [ ] description line contains "nextjs-add-auth"

**Verify:** `grep 'description:' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md | head -1` → no NextAuth, contains nextjs-add-auth

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'description:' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md | head -1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["description line contains no NextAuth", "description line contains nextjs-add-auth"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add post-scaffold agent workflow to fastapi-scaffold
tasks.description:
**Goal:** fastapi-scaffold dispatches shared-build-agent, shared-test-agent, shared-update-agent after AGENTS.md is written, with bypass warning. Generated AGENTS.md includes drift-check note.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] shared-build-agent present
- [ ] shared-test-agent present
- [ ] shared-update-agent present
- [ ] shared-drift-check in AGENTS.md template
- [ ] bypass warning present

**Verify:** `grep -c 'shared-build-agent\|shared-test-agent\|shared-update-agent' skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md` → 3+

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'shared-build-agent\\|shared-test-agent\\|shared-update-agent' skills/fastapi-scaffold/SKILL.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shared-build-agent present", "shared-test-agent present", "shared-update-agent present", "shared-drift-check present in AGENTS.md template", "bypass warning present"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Standardise nextjs-scaffold Step 7 agent dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Use shared- prefixed names, add missing shared-test-agent, remove redundant second build-agent, add bypass warning, fix drift-check reference.

**Files:**
- Modify: `skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] All agent refs use shared- prefix
- [ ] shared-test-agent added
- [ ] bypass warning present
- [ ] shared-drift-check used

**Verify:** `grep 'build-agent\|update-agent\|test-agent' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md | grep -v 'shared-'` → no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep 'build-agent\\|update-agent\\|test-agent' skills/nextjs-scaffold/SKILL.md | grep -v 'shared-'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all agent refs use shared- prefix", "shared-test-agent added", "bypass warning present", "shared-drift-check used instead of drift-check"]}
```
